# `x-ssl-expiry-date`

Check SSL certificate expiry date


- **Usage**: `x-ssl-expiry-date [-p <port>] [-d <days>] <hostname>`

## Arguments

### `<hostname>`

Domain or hostname to check

## Flags

### `-p <port>`

Port number (default: 443)

### `-d <days>`

Days threshold for expiry warning
